positive: Minimalist stylized jungle silhouette pattern, featuring oversized monstera leaves, banana palms, and tropical flora arranged in an interlocking, repeating geometric design. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for repeating textile print. Use a strong, solid black silhouette against a crisp, creamy off-white background. The style should be graphic vector art, high contrast, bold, clean lines, and highly detailed but flat. Perfect for modern streetwear apparel. Ideal for screen printing effect.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, low detail, artifacts, cartoon, painting, gradient, excessive color, solid color background
